text.title: Faion CLI as agent skill â€” procedure
text.summary: Six-step build from provider choice to smoke test.

step.name: Pick provider format
step.input: Agent runtime (Anthropic SDK, OpenAI Assistants, LangGraph).
step.action: Select the tool-defn JSON dialect (Anthropic `tools[]`, OpenAI `functions[]`, LangGraph `StructuredTool`). Record in `provider` field.
step.output: One of `anthropic|openai|langgraph` written to the bundle.

step.name: Declare the two tools
step.action: Author `faion_search` and `faion_get_content` with typed input_schema (rule r2). Limit description to 400 chars.
step.output: `tools[]` array of length 2 satisfying the JSON Schema.

step.name: Write the system prompt
step.action: Fill in: when to call (low-confidence answer, novel domain), budget reminder (r1), 403 path (r3), paraphrase + cite rule. Keep under 600 tokens.

step.name: Wire the dispatcher
step.input: templates/dispatcher.py; CLI install path; cache dir.
step.action: Implement: PII strip â†’ cache check â†’ subprocess â†’ budget meter â†’ log. Map 403 to `{"preview":"...","upgrade_to":"pro"}` payload (r3).
step.output: Dispatcher module integrated into the agent loop.
step.decision-gate: If runtime is Anthropic SDK and `client.messages.create` is used, prefer `MessageStream` tool-use loop for proper streaming.

step.name: Meter and log
step.action: Emit one log line per tool call (r6): JSON with `tool_name`, `args_redacted`, `latency_ms`, `status`, `cached`. Ship to whatever log sink the host uses.
step.output: Log schema documented; one sample line attached to PR.

step.name: Smoke-test the bundle
step.input: Bundle + 5 representative user prompts (one of each: easy, ambiguous, gated, PII-laden, methodology lookup).
step.action: Run end-to-end against a staging tier. Verify: â‰¤3 calls per turn, PII stripped in logs, 403 surfaces preview, cache hit on second identical prompt.
step.decision-gate: Any failure â†’ block deploy; re-run after fix.
